channel.title: Zeitschrift für Kristallographie - Crystalline Materials
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Zeitschrift für Kristallographie - Crystalline Materials

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Alexander M. Banaru, Konstantin G. Seravkin, Daria A. Banaru, Sergey M. Aksenov, Eric A. Lord DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zkri-2025-frontmatter1-2

item.title: In this issue
item.description: Article by Alexander M. Banaru, Konstantin G. Seravkin, Daria A. Banaru, Sergey M. Aksenov, Eric A. Lord DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zkri-2025-graphabs1-2

item.title: SrAl8Rh2 – the first phase in the Sr/Al/Rh system and new representative of the CeAl8Fe2 type structure
item.description: Article by Alexander M. Banaru, Konstantin G. Seravkin, Daria A. Banaru, Sergey M. Aksenov, Eric A. Lord DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zkri-2024-0115
Article by Alexander M. Banaru, Konstantin G. Seravkin, Daria A. Banaru, Sergey M. Aksenov, Eric A. Lord DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zkri-2024-0117

item.title: Thermal evolution of soddyite, (UO2)2SiO4(H2O)2 and structurally related Na2(UO2)2SiO4F2
item.description: Article by Alexander M. Banaru, Konstantin G. Seravkin, Daria A. Banaru, Sergey M. Aksenov, Eric A. Lord DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zkri-2024-0091

item.title: Synthesis and crystallographic characterization of Cu[SeCN]
item.description: Article by Alexander M. Banaru, Konstantin G. Seravkin, Daria A. Banaru, Sergey M. Aksenov, Eric A. Lord DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zkri-2024-0118

item.title: Synthesis, structure and fluorescence of a novel zinc(II) polymer based on N-[(3-pyridine)-3-sulfonyl]-threonine
item.description: Article by Alexander M. Banaru, Konstantin G. Seravkin, Daria A. Banaru, Sergey M. Aksenov, Eric A. Lord DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zkri-2024-0101

item.title: How many symmetry operations are needed to generate a space group?
item.description: Article by Alexander M. Banaru, Konstantin G. Seravkin, Daria A. Banaru, Sergey M. Aksenov, Eric A. Lord DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zkri-2024-0110
